summary: Bug fix EMP-BUG-01 verified: When all input fields are blank on the Predictions tab and 'Generate Prediction' is clicked, it now correctly returns 0.0000 (not $151,075) with a toast warning 'All input fields are empty — prediction defaults to 0.' All regression tests passed.

issues:
Minor: validateDOMNesting warning -
cannot appear as descendant of

in Badge component

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX VERIFIED (App.js lines 1250-1259): handlePredict now checks if ALL numeric and categorical fields are empty before calling ML engine, returns 0 directly with toast warning
Code implementation is correct: allNumericEmpty && allCatEmpty check guards against Linear Regression intercept producing ~$151K with all-zero inputs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug EMP-BUG-01 is fixed. The Insurance Costs sample dataset (1100 rows, 9 columns) was used for testing. Training takes ~30 seconds. The handlePredict function in App.js (lines 1244-1278) now has an all-fields-empty guard that returns 0 with a toast warning before calling the ML engine.

EMP-BUG-01.description: When all input fields are blank on Predictions tab, clicking 'Generate Prediction' should return 0.0000 instead of ~$151,075
test_steps: 3. Load Insurance Costs sample dataset (toast shows '1100 rows, 9 columns')
5. Click Start Training and wait ~30 seconds
7. Leave ALL fields blank (Age, BMI, NumChildren, etc.)
EMP-BUG-01.expected_result: Prediction value shows 0.0000 and toast warning appears
EMP-BUG-01.actual_result: Prediction value: 0.0000, Toast: 'All input fields are empty — prediction defaults to 0.'

upload_toast.description: Loading sample dataset shows upload toast

prediction_with_values.description: Entering actual values (Age=30, BMI=25, NumChildren=1) returns valid non-zero prediction

prediction_result_formatting.description: Prediction result panel displays correctly with proper formatting
prediction_result_formatting.actual_result: Shows 'Predicted Value: 16636.3156', 'Generated using Linear Regression', and Input Summary badges

model_training.description: Model training completes successfully with algorithm leaderboard
model_training.actual_result: Ridge Regression (97.02% R²), Linear Regression (97.01% R²), Random Forest (40.59% R²), etc.

code_verification.fix_implementation: const allNumericEmpty = am.modelData.numericCols.every(col => predictionFormData[col] === undefined || predictionFormData[col] === '' || predictionFormData[col] === null); const allCatEmpty = am.modelData.categoricalCols.every(col => !predictionFormData[col] || predictionFormData[col] === ''); if (allNumericEmpty && allCatEmpty) { setPredictionResult({...}); toast.warning('All input fields are empty — prediction defaults to 0.'); return; }
